_schema: PEFT Knowledge Graph — conforms to schema.md. Nodes: Method, Paper, Benchmark. Edges: INTRODUCES, EXTENDS, COMPARED_AGAINST, EVALUATED_ON, APPLIES.

_status.3.2_compared_against_evaluated_on: COMPLETE (13 papers, results tables read via ar5iv)

methods.name: Adapters
methods.mechanism: Inserts small trainable bottleneck modules (down-project, nonlinearity, up-project) between frozen transformer sub-layers.

methods.name: Pfeiffer Adapters
methods.mechanism: Adapter modules placed at a single (post-FFN) position per layer and composed across tasks via a fusion layer.

methods.name: Compacter
methods.mechanism: Adapters whose weight matrices are Kronecker products of shared low-rank / hypercomplex factors, cutting adapter parameters.

methods.name: Prefix-Tuning
methods.mechanism: Prepends trainable continuous key/value prefix vectors to the attention of every transformer layer; the model stays frozen.

methods.name: Prompt-Tuning
methods.mechanism: Prepends trainable soft-prompt embeddings at the input layer only; a strict input-layer special case of prefix tuning.

methods.name: P-Tuning
methods.mechanism: Continuous prompt embeddings produced by a small prompt encoder (LSTM/MLP) inserted into the input; targets NLU.

methods.name: P-Tuning v2
methods.mechanism: Deep continuous prompts applied at every layer (prefix-style) for NLU across scales; merges P-Tuning framing with deep prefixes.

methods.name: LoRA
methods.mechanism: Adds a trainable low-rank update B*A to frozen weight matrices (W + BA); mergeable at inference, no extra latency.

methods.name: AdaLoRA
methods.mechanism: LoRA with adaptive rank: allocates the rank budget across weight matrices via SVD-based importance pruning of singular values.

methods.name: QLoRA
methods.mechanism: LoRA adapters trained on top of a 4-bit NF4-quantized frozen base with double quantization and paged optimizers.

methods.name: VeRA
methods.mechanism: Freezes a pair of shared random low-rank matrices and trains only small per-layer scaling vectors on top of them.

methods.name: BitFit
methods.mechanism: Trains only the existing bias terms of the model; injects no new parameters at all.

methods.name: (IA)^3
methods.mechanism: Learns element-wise rescaling vectors that multiply the keys, values, and FFN activations; multiplicative, not additive.

EXTENDS.note: Repositions/prunes Houlsby modules; reduces to Houlsby config.
Kronecker/hypercomplex parameterization of the same adapter module.
Restricts prefixes to input layer only; strict simplification.
Uniform rank budget -> plain LoRA. Passes reduction test.
Trainable mechanism is unmodified LoRA; novelty in frozen base (quantization).
Freezes A,B; trains scaling vectors. Explicitly modifies LoRA's decomposition.
